name: Stroganoff Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Can condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart saucepan over medium heat, melt margarine in hot.
2. Cook the onion until tender.
3. Stir in the soup, sour cream, milk and paprika. Heat through, stirring often.
To Microwave:
1. Reduce margarine to 1 teaspoon.
2. In a 1 1/2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine margarine and onion.
3. Cover with lid; microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes or until the onion is tender, stirring halfway through cooking.
4. Stir in the soup, sour cream, milk and paprika. Cover; microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes or until hot, stirring halfway through cooking.
5. Serve over vegetables, beef or rice. Makes about 2 cups sauce.
